title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Backend Developer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
